rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns property tax appraisal and bears no relation to instructional time waivers for school safety training under Educ. Code §25.0815.
quote: Sec. 25.0815. OPERATION AND INSTRUCTIONAL TIME WAIVERS FOR SCHOOL SAFETY TRAINING.
_note: No overlap between proposed change and rule text; rule addresses school instructional minutes, not property tax exemptions.
